description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and defines two stages: test and test_badge. In the test stage add an rspec job that uses the mongo:latest service, sets MONGO_HOST, MONGO_USER, MONGO_PASSWORD and MONGO_PORT variables, runs cp config/mongoid-ci.yml config/mongoid.yml, gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, bundle check || bundle install, and bundle exec rspec, and saves the coverage/ directory as an artifact. In the test_badge stage add a coverage job that depends on rspec, moves the coverage/ folder to public/ with mv coverage/ public/, stores the public/ directory as an artifact that expires in 30 days, and runs only on the master branch.
